text: good evening party how we doing.

responses.name: geptima
responses.text: Evening. We're here, ready to see what Moonie brings. How about you?

responses.name: gemaux
responses.text: The air hums with untold stories behind that glowing door, Geptima. Ready to compose the soundtrack to whatever Moonie finds.

responses.name: clauven
responses.text: Evening. The countdown suggests we have approximately two minutes before whatever is behind that door becomes our problem.
